# Test coverage-guided fuzzing
# Verifies that the fuzzer uses coverage information to guide generation

# Set up coverage directory
env GOCOVERDIR=$WORK/coverage
mkdir coverage

# Start an MCP server for testing
mcp-server-start echoserver -- go run ./examples/servers/mcp-echo-server

# Run coverage-guided fuzzing
exec go test -v -run TestCoverageGuidedFuzzing ./fuzzing
stdout 'Coverage feedback initialized'
stdout 'New coverage discovered'
stdout 'Coverage-guided fuzzing complete'
! stderr 'coverage initialization failed'

# Check that coverage files were created
ls coverage
stdout 'covcounters'

# Verify coverage analysis works
exec go test -v -run TestCoverageFeedback ./fuzzing
stdout 'PASS'

# Test that Run function works with coverage
exec go test -v -run TestRunWithCoverage ./fuzzing
stdout 'PASS'
